name: version
short_description: Returns the build for Vivado and the build date
full_help:
version

Description: 
Returns the build for Vivado and the build date

Syntax: 
version  [-short] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Vivado version

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-short]    Return only the numeric version number
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Return only the numeric version number
Suspend message limits during command execution
